title: Pending-graduations consolidation pass complete
body: Processed pending-graduations.md conservation-first. Due queue is now empty; former due entries are routed to graduated, retained-pending, or owner/implementation-decision state. Remaining pending queue was reviewed by category without trimming substance. Did not start practice-bootstrap.md. Focused markdownlint and Prettier checks passed for pending-graduations.md and napkin.md.
